cards.name: Aharon, Florida Man
abilities: Whenever Aharon, Florida Man deploys to production, you may discard a card. If you do, create a 3/3 green Alligator creature token with trample.
cards.flavor_text: In Tampa's murky swamps, the elusive Florida Man is as rare a find as soft water.

cards.name: Aharon, Startup Investor
abilities: When Aharon, Startup Investor enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 colorless human VC investor creature token.
Whenever an engineer or investor enters the battlefield, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: "Hey Nick, wanna be the CTO of my new soundboards-as-a-service company?"

cards.name: Aharon, Unix Administrator
abilities: When Aharon, Unix Administrator enters the battlefield, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
cards.flavor_text: "Hey Allen, before you start, did you consider whether we should write the workflow processing engine in Perl?"

cards.name: Acquired Cybersecurity Startup
cards.flavor_text: The servers still chirp, but now it's just the echo of data long flown the coop.

cards.name: Drama-Free Friday
abilities: At the beginning of your end step, if no spells were cast this turn, draw a card.
Sacrifice Drama-Free Friday: Opponents can't cast spells during their next turn.

cards.name: Interstate 4
abilities: RR, Tap: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

cards.name: Alligator
cards.flavor_text:
Interior crocodile alligator
I drive a Chevrolet movie theater
